concepts_used.title: 模型假设的写法
concepts_used.how_used: 论文列出了11条假设，包括债务利息复利、政府支出优先于偿债、无汇率影响、人口稳定增长、无突发事件等，为模型简化提供基础。
concepts_used.source_excerpt: ASSUMPTIONS (1) That the aforementioned “national debt” refers to gross debt... (2) That interest rates on said national debt are compounded annually...

concepts_used.title: 常微分方程建模基础
concepts_used.how_used: 建立离散时间差分方程模型：d_t = d_{t-1} * (1 + s_t) + (e_t - i_t)，描述国家债务随时间的变化，考虑利息和收支差额。
concepts_used.source_excerpt: d = d * (1 + s) + (e – i) ... In words, we are taking the national debt from one year prior and adding in the interest for that amount.

concepts_used.title: 非线性与指数模型拟合
concepts_used.how_used: 使用幂函数、指数函数和反比例函数三种模型拟合利率随时间的变化，并比较残差图选择最佳模型。最终采用反比例模型 s = 0.02365/t + 0.04312。

concepts_used.title: 残差分析与模型诊断
concepts_used.how_used: 对每个利率模型绘制残差图，检查残差分布是否随机、有无模式，从而判断模型拟合优劣。最终选择残差无模式的逆模型。
concepts_used.source_excerpt: This residual plot shows that there are no patterns... From the residual plot, there are no discernable patterns that can be observed.

concepts_used.title: 常用图表类型及选择指南
concepts_used.how_used: 论文使用散点图展示利率数据与拟合曲线，并附残差图，直观比较不同模型的拟合效果。图表清晰标注坐标轴和标题。
concepts_used.source_excerpt: This graph shows a relative correlation between time and interest rates... (图表在原文中展示)

concepts_used.title: 论文整体结构（IMRaD 格式）
concepts_used.how_used: 论文采用IMRaD结构：摘要（Summary Sheet）、问题重述、假设、变量定义、模型建立、模型求解（含多个子模型）、结果分析、结论与建议。
concepts_used.source_excerpt: RESTATEMENT OF THE PROBLEM ... ASSUMPTIONS ... DEFINITION OF VARIABLES ... MODEL BUILDING DISCUSSION ...
